What's Really Happening Up There

It's not age that kills your roof.

The slow loss of natural oils leaves shingles brittle and vulnerable. By the time you notice damage, the process has been underway for years.

☀️

Step 1 — Oil Loss

UV radiation pulls natural oils out of asphalt shingles, starting 7–10 years after installation.

🪨

Step 2 — Brittleness

Without oils, shingles harden and crack. They can no longer flex with temperature changes.

💧

Step 3 — Failure

Cracked shingles shed granules. Bare spots absorb water. Moisture finds its way through.

“Modern shingles have less asphalt due to oil refining changes — they fail faster now.”

Mike & Todd Feazel — 25 years in roofing, partnered with Battelle Labs to develop Roof Maxx

The Numbers Don't Lie

Why replace it when you can restore it?

❌ Full Roof Replacement
$15,000 – $30,000+
  • Disrupts your home for 1–2 days
  • Old shingles go to the landfill
  • One-time solution — cycle restarts
  • Financing often required
✓ RoofMaxx Treatment
$1,500 – $6,000
  • Extends roof life up to 5 years per treatment
  • Reapplicable up to 3 times — up to 15 years
  • 5-year transferable warranty
  • Completed in one day, no disruption
Save up to 90% compared to replacement.

The Science Behind It

Plant-based soy oil — applied directly to your shingles.

Developed with the USDA and Ohio State University. Penetrates asphalt to replenish what the sun has taken away.

  • 🔄
    Restores FlexibilityReplenishes lost oils so shingles flex instead of cracking under thermal stress.
  • 🪨
    Improves Granule AdhesionReactivates bonding matrix that holds protective granules in place.
  • 🔒
    Revitalizes Self-SealingReactivates the tar strip along each shingle edge, restoring waterproof seal.
  • 🎨
    Deepens Color ImmediatelyYour roof looks noticeably darker and more uniform right after treatment.
⏱ 1–2 hour application • Penetrates in 30 min • 5-year transferable warranty • Up to 3 apps = 15 years

What We Offer

One company for every stage of your roof's life.

💧

RoofMaxx Rejuvenation Treatment

Plant-based soy oil penetrates and restores shingle flexibility and granule adhesion — extending roof life by up to 5 years per application.

5-Year Warranty • Up to 3 Applications
🧼

Roof Soft Wash Cleaning

Removes algae, mold, lichen, and organic growth without high-pressure water. Restores curb appeal and prepares surface for treatment.

Safe for All Shingle Types
🔧

Roof Tune-Up

Pipe boot replacement, nail head caulking, rain collar installation, and minor repairs before they become expensive.

Preventive Maintenance

The Two Worst Decisions a Homeowner Can Make

Don't fall into either trap.

👎

Do Nothing

Your home's concerns are likely to worsen as costs continue to rise. A roof that qualifies for a $2,000 treatment today may require a $20,000+ replacement next year. Inaction is the most expensive choice.

⚠️

Avoid Both of These Mistakes

Whether you wait too long or hire the wrong crew, the result is the same — more damage and more money out of pocket. Protect your investment by acting now and choosing a company that's licensed, insured, and accountable.

The best time to address your roof is before a small problem becomes an expensive one.

😰

Hiring the Wrong Company

Improper installation, no warranty, no accountability. “Chuck in a truck” companies leave homeowners with bigger problems — and no one to call when things go wrong.
